title: Incorrect evaluation of combinational circuit with const-bit-op-tree

features.name: bitwise_not_of_xor_in_const_bit_op_tree
features.description: Code should include a bitwise NOT operator applied to an XOR expression where both operands are constants after optimization, in a combinational circuit
features.snippet:
logic [7:0] a, b, result;
assign result = ~(a ^ b);

features.name: combinational_circuit_optimization_sensitive
features.description: Code should include a combinational circuit where optimization level (-O3 vs -O0) produces different evaluation results
